user.title: Set up Weight Scale
user.description: Found {count} SIG-compliant BLE weight scale(s). Select one or enter a MAC address manually.

bluetooth_confirm.title: Confirm Weight Scale
bluetooth_confirm.description: Do you want to set up **{name}** ({address})?

abort.no_devices_found: No SIG-compliant BLE weight scales were found nearby.

init.title: User Data Service Settings
init.description:
Configure the consent settings for scales that support multiple user profiles (User Data Service, 0x181C).

Leave **User Index** at {user_index_auto} to auto-detect. Set **Consent Code** to the PIN shown on your scale (usually 0). If you are setting up this scale for the first time, enable **Auto Register** to create a new user slot automatically.

data.uds_auto_register: Auto Register new user if index not found

error.user_index_out_of_range: User Index must be between 0 and 255.
error.consent_code_out_of_range: Consent Code must be between 0 and 65535.
